state.next-action: `12-02` now has live staff-admin controls on `/ops/users`: role-template assignment, Clerk invite send or reissue, pending-invite revoke, and explicit provider resync all run through app-owned ops routes while preserving first-party staff roles during Clerk reconciliation. Continue the phase by extending the same contract to the remaining admin gaps: entitlement lock or unlock plus suspension controls, then `/ops/customers` actions for account linkage and customer-facing access cleanup. If feature flags expand beyond env toggles, keep them behind an app-owned adapter so Vercel Flags can be swapped later without scattering provider calls through the UI.
